signIn.additionalVerificationBody: Additional verification is required for this account.

signUp.title: Create account

signUp.verifyBody: Check your inbox for the verification code, then sign in.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.description: Quick answers to the most common HomeDecor AI questions.

credits.question: How do credits work in HomeDecor AI?
credits.answer: Each redesign uses credits based on the workflow and export quality you choose. Your remaining balance updates automatically after every generation.

pro.question: What do I unlock with PRO?
pro.answer: PRO unlocks premium generation tools, faster processing, and higher-end output quality through the paywall flow in the app.

slowResult.question: Why is my result taking longer than expected?
slowResult.answer: Generation times depend on queue load, source image quality, and the workflow you selected. Keeping the app open on a stable connection helps avoid interruptions.

deleteAccount.question: How do I delete my account?
deleteAccount.answer: Open Settings and choose Delete Information. This removes your account data and signs you out after confirmation.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: The information we collect, how it is used, and the controls you have inside HomeDecor AI.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.description: The rules, expectations, and service boundaries for using HomeDecor AI.

floorFlow.title: Floor Restyle
floorFlow.promptPlaceholder: Type a detailed description of the floor transformation you want to see.
floorFlow.selectMaterialBody: Select a premium material curated to read as photoreal, perspective-aware, and listing-ready.
floorFlow.unlockMaterialBody: Select a flooring material to unlock the AI restyle.
floorFlow.addPromptBody: Describe the exact floor transformation you want before continuing.
floorFlow.generatePromptBody: Choose a custom floor prompt before generating.
floorFlow.autoMaskPreparing: Preparing the automatic floor mask. Please wait a moment.
floorFlow.autoMaskFailure: Auto-detect couldn't run. Please brush manually.
floorFlow.savePermissionBody: Please allow photo library access to save your result to the device gallery.
floorFlow.cameraAccessBody: Please enable camera access to capture a floor photo.
floorFlow.photoAccessBody: Please enable photo library access to upload a floor photo.
floorFlow.exampleUnavailableBody: This example photo could not be opened.
floorFlow.markFloorBody: Brush over the floor area you want to restyle before continuing.
floorFlow.pickMaterialBody: Choose a flooring material before continuing.
floorFlow.renderFinishing: This render is already finishing up.
floorFlow.cancelSuccess: Generation canceled. Your credit was kept.

promptExamples.oak: Lay warm natural oak planks with a matte finish while preserving the room layout and lighting.
promptExamples.marble: Restyle the floor in polished Carrara marble with crisp veining and premium editorial contrast.
promptExamples.concrete: Apply a soft concrete floor with subtle texture and realistic reflections for a modern gallery feel.
promptExamples.travertine: Introduce light travertine flooring with soft natural variation and warm afternoon light response.
promptExamples.walnut: Design a refined herringbone walnut floor that feels luxurious, grounded, and photorealistic.

paintFlow.title: Paint
paintFlow.colorPickerTitle: Choose a color for your wall
paintFlow.detectBody: HomeDecor AI is tracing repaintable wall surfaces while leaving windows, furniture, trim, and flooring untouched.
paintFlow.preparingMaskBody: HomeDecor AI is refining the canvas so you can paint crisp edges around built-ins, windows, and furniture.
paintFlow.finishBody: Choose how the paint should catch light so the walls read correctly in a polished, designer-grade render.
paintFlow.colorLockedBody: Wall color is locked. Now choose the final sheen profile for the render.
paintFlow.customColorDescription: Custom wall tone selected from the precision color picker.
paintFlow.chooseColorBody: Choose a wall color before continuing.
paintFlow.savePermissionBody: Please allow photo library access to save your result to the device gallery.

paintFlow.photoAccessBody: Please enable photo library access to upload a room photo.
paintFlow.exampleUnavailableBody: This example photo could not be opened.
paintFlow.markWallsBody: Brush over the wall surfaces you want to repaint before generating.
paintFlow.pickColorBody: Choose a wall color before continuing.
paintFlow.autoDetectSuccess: Walls detected. Brush to refine if needed.
paintFlow.autoDetectFailure: Auto-detect couldn't run. Please brush manually.
paintFlow.renderFinishing: This render is already finishing up.
paintFlow.cancelSuccess: Generation canceled. Your credit was kept.
paintFlow.intakeTitle: Add a Photo of your Room
paintFlow.intakeBody: Upload a room photo for precise wall recoloring.
paintFlow.intakeReadyTitle: Photo added. Mark the wall area next.
paintFlow.intakeReadyBody: Your photo is locked in. Next, brush the wall surfaces so the recolor stays precise around trim, furniture, and decor.

matte.label: Matte
matte.description: Soft, gallery-grade color payoff with the least surface glare.

satin.label: Satin
satin.description: Balanced sheen for modern interiors with a subtle designer glow.

glossy.label: Glossy
glossy.description: A polished reflective finish for bold, high-contrast statement walls.
